description: Candidate datasets for validating the geometric decision theory. validates: A=fit-and-transfer the shared metric (individual-level, cross-domain, out-of-sample); B=projection-gap (non-monetary coordinate varied at fixed money/lottery). Confidence and access are best-known and PROBED by fetch.py (statuses are not asserted).

datasets.name: Choice Prediction Competition 2018 (risky choice)
datasets.probe_note: initial GitHub guess (ohaddan/CPC18) returned 404 on probe; competition site is the entry point, exact data repo needs manual confirmation.
datasets.notes: Gold standard for out-of-sample individual risky-choice prediction; direct benchmark to beat for the lottery leg.

datasets.name: Global Preferences Survey
datasets.authors: Falk, Becker, Dohmen, Enke, Huffman, Sunde
datasets.notes: Rare CROSS-DOMAIN, same-subject data (risk + social preferences). Best test of the shared-metric claim in humans.

datasets.name: Risk and Rationality (individual CPT estimation)
datasets.notes: Per-subject CPT parameters; competitor-under-common-protocol for the risky leg.

datasets.name: Many Labs 2
datasets.notes: Individual-level framing manipulations at scale; encoding-manipulation validation.

datasets.name: Moral Machine
datasets.notes: Encodes d6/d7 at massive scale; already used in the tensor work.

datasets.name: Social-Chemistry-101
datasets.notes: Already used to seed CHSH; encodes social/normative dimensions for d6/d8.

datasets.name: Kahneman-Tversky replication across 19 countries
datasets.authors: Ruggeri et al. (2020), Nat. Hum. Behav.
datasets.notes: Already a TCSS target; here for individual-level re-analysis.

datasets.name: Ambiguity and reduction of compound lotteries
datasets.notes: Existing human projection-gap on d9: matched EV, ambiguity varied.
